title: The Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010
full_text: The Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010 नैदानिक स्‍थापन (रजिस्‍ट्रीकरण और विनियमन)अधिनियम, 2010 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201023 Act Number: 23 Enactment Date: 2010-08-18 Act Year: 2010 Short Title: The Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010 Hindi Title: नैदानिक स्‍थापन (रजिस्‍ट्रीकरण और विनियमन)अधिनियम, 2010 Long Title: An Act to provide for the registration and regulation of clinical establishments in the country and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 18-09-2010 (in respect of Arunachal Pradesh, Himachal Pradesh, Mizoram and Sikkim and the Union territories) except other states Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL COUNCIL FOR CLINICAL ESTABLISHMENTS CHAPTER III REGISTRATION AND STANDARDS FOR CLINICAL ESTABLISHMENTS CHAPTER IV PROCEDURE FOR REGISTRATION CHAPTER V REGISTER OF CLINICAL ESTABLISHMENTS CHAPTER VI PENALTIES CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, application and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of National Council. Section 4. Disqualifications for appointment as member. Section 5. Functions of National Council. Section 6. Power to seek advice or assistance. Section 7. National Council to follow consultative process. Section 8. State Council of clinical establishments. Section 9. Providing information to National Council. Section 10. Authority for registration. Section 11. Registration for clinical establishments. Section 12. Condition for registration. Section 13. Classification of clinical establishments. Section 14. Application for provisional certificate of registration. Section 15. Provisional certificate. Section 16. No inquiry prior to provisional registration. Section 17. Validity of provisional registration. Section 18. Display of certificate of registration. Section 19. Duplicate certificate. Section 20. Certificate to be non-transferable. Section 21. Publication of expiry of registration. Section 22. Renewal of registration. Section 23. Time limit for provisional registration. Section 24. Application for permanent registration. Section 25. Verification of application. Section 26. Display of information for filing objections. Section 27. Communication of objections. Section 28. Standards for permanent registration. Section 29. Allowing or disallowing of registration. Section 30. Certificate of permanent registration. Section 31. Fresh application for permanent registration. Section 32. Cancellation of registration. Section 33. Inspection of registered clinical establishments. Section 34. Power to enter. Section 35. Levy of fee by State Government Appeal. Section 36. Appeal. Section 37. Register of clinical establishments. Section 38. Maintenance of State Register of clinical establishments. Section 39. Maintenance of National Register of clinical establishments. Section 40. Penalty. Section 41. Monetary penalty for non-registration. Section 42. Disobedience of direction, obstruction and refusal of information. Section 43. Penalty for minor deficiencies. Section 44. Contravention by companies. Section 45. Offences by Government Departments. Section 46. Recovery of fine. Section 47. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 48. Furnishing of returns, etc. Section 49. Power to give directions. Section 50. Employees of the authority, etc., to be public servants. Section 51. Power to remove difficulties. Section 52. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 53. Laying of rules. Section 54. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 55. Laying of rules. Section 56. Savings. Schedule 1.
